playbook.intent: v1 is not working: retention flat, growth stalled, founder energy bleeding.
playbook.scope: v1 is not working: retention flat, growth stalled, founder energy bleeding. Decide and execute a structured pivot (segment / feature / model / sunset) without burning the brand or the customer trust.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Honest diagnosis
stage.intent: Name what failed and why - no euphemisms.

tasks.task: Compile retention, growth, and energy data
Interview self + top 3 advisors
Write a 1-page failure post-mortem

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a written cause, not a vibe.

stage.name: Pivot vs quit decision
stage.intent: Use a decision template before the heart picks for you.

tasks.task: Walk the pivot-vs-quit template
List 3 candidate pivot vectors (segment / feature / model / sunset)
Score each against runway, energy, and evidence

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if one vector has clearly higher score AND positive energy signal.

stage.name: Re-validation interviews
stage.intent: Confirm the new direction with the same rigor as v1.

tasks.task: Run 10 Mom-test interviews in the new niche
Test the new JTBD framing
Tag severity + willingness-to-pay

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with >=5/10 strong painpoint matches. Else revisit vector.

stage.name: Customer comms plan
stage.intent: Protect trust with existing v1 customers.

tasks.task: Segment current customers (migrate / refund / sunset)
Draft difficult-conversation comms per segment
Schedule the announcement window

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when comms templates are reviewed by one outside reader.

stage.name: Tech-debt audit
stage.intent: Decide what code to keep, refactor, or burn.

tasks.task: Inventory the v1 codebase with ADRs
Mark each module: reuse / refactor / kill
Write a migration plan with explicit cuts

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when reuse % is clearly justified (or honestly accept a rewrite).

stage.name: v2 spec + scope cut
stage.intent: Write a deliberately small v2 spec.

tasks.task: Write a 1-page v2 spec
List explicit non-goals
Map acceptance criteria per feature

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if v2 spec is smaller than v1 spec at equivalent stage.

stage.name: Launch v2 quietly
stage.intent: Ship to a small, friendly audience first.

tasks.task: Migrate or refund v1 users on schedule
Soft-launch v2 to design partners
Hold off a public re-launch until retention curve forms

stage.decision-gate: Advance when first cohort hits week-4 retention threshold.

stage.name: Brand-trust audit
stage.intent: Check trust signals before going wide.

tasks.task: Pull sentiment from socials, reviews, and inbox
Surface any open trust debt from v1 sunset
Address each item publicly or privately

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no open public trust debt remains.

stage.name: Pattern + mistake memory
stage.intent: Lock the lesson so v2 does not repeat v1.

tasks.task: Write a reflexion doc
Update pattern memory with what saved time
Update mistake memory with traps that bled v1

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when memories are committed and reviewed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content pivot-from-failed-v1-to-v2 --format md, agent: faion get-content pivot-from-failed-v1-to-v2 --format context, json: faion get-content pivot-from-failed-v1-to-v2 --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
